problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Casimir. Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
